title: vangueria chariensis
intro: Vangueria chariensis, also known as the "Horn-pod or bushwillow," is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Vangueria chariensis include its ability to treat fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce the severity of malaria symptoms. In herbal preparations, Vangueria chariensis is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
